summary: Announcement Bar feature fully tested and working. All 16 backend tests passed (100%). All frontend UI tests passed for homepage, programs page, about page, and admin panel.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/announcements returns list of active announcements
Backend: GET /api/announcements?active_only=false returns all announcements
Backend: POST /api/announcements creates announcement successfully
Backend: POST /api/announcements with minimal payload (text only) works
Backend: POST /api/announcements validates text min length (422 for <5 chars)
Backend: PUT /api/announcements/{id} toggles is_active status
Backend: PUT /api/announcements/{id} updates text
Backend: PUT /api/announcements/{id} returns 404 for non-existent id
Backend: DELETE /api/announcements/{id} returns 404 for non-existent id
Backend: GET /api/cyber-warriors/upcoming-events returns events within 3 days
Backend: Events for tomorrow appear with days_until=1, is_today=false
Backend: Events for today appear with is_today=true, days_until=0
Backend: Events >3 days away are excluded from upcoming-events
Frontend: Announcement bar renders at y=0 (above navbar) on homepage
Frontend: Announcement bar has blue background (rgb(21, 69, 234))
Frontend: Navigation arrows visible when multiple announcements exist
Frontend: Next/Prev arrow clicks work correctly
Frontend: Close/dismiss button removes announcement bar
Frontend: Announcement bar shows on /programs page
Frontend: Announcement bar shows on /about page
Frontend: Announcement link (Register Now) navigates to /cyber-warriors
Frontend: Auto-detected Cyber Warriors event shows in bar (e.g., 'Upcoming in 1 day: Cyber Warriors - Cyber Safety Workshop')
Admin: Login with password 'etieducom@admin2025' works
Admin: Announcements tab displays all announcements
Admin: Add Announcement modal opens with form fields (text, link URL, link text, order)
Admin: Activate/Deactivate toggle works - button changes state
Admin: Toast notification shows 'Announcement activated/deactivated'
critical_code_review_comments: AnnouncementBar.jsx uses sessionStorage for dismiss state - good for session-based persistence
Blue background (#1545ea) provides good contrast with white text
Proper data-testid attributes added for all interactive elements
API correctly combines admin announcements with auto-detected Cyber Warriors events
z-index set to 60 ensures bar appears above other elements
seed_data_creation: Backend tests created TEST_ prefixed announcements and events, cleaned up after tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Announcement Bar feature fully tested. Blue bar appears above navbar on all pages (except landing pages). Shows admin-managed announcements + auto-detected Cyber Warriors events within 3 days. Navigation arrows allow cycling through multiple announcements. Dismiss button hides bar for session. Admin panel has Announcements tab with add/activate/deactivate/delete functionality. All APIs at /api/announcements work correctly.

announcement_bar_frontend: Link with external icon navigates correctly
Zap icon for Cyber Warriors events
cyber_warriors_auto_detection: Events within 3 days auto-appear in bar
is_today flag shows 'LIVE TODAY' with red gradient background
admin_panel_announcements: Modal fields: text, link URL, link text, display order

test_data_used.existing_announcement: New Batches Starting! Enroll now for Digital Marketing & Web Development courses
test_data_used.auto_detected_event: Cyber Safety Workshop at ABC School (upcoming in 1 day)
